description: A social historian is studying class stratification aboard the Titanic. Using the dataset at ~/Documents/Jamovi/TitanicSurvival.csv, perform a multinomial logistic regression in Jamovi to predict passenger class from survival status, sex, and age. The analysis must include the overall model test, pseudo R-squared measures (McFadden, Cox & Snell, and Nagelkerke), and odds ratios for the coefficients. Save the completed analysis file to ~/Documents/Jamovi/MultinomialTitanic.omv.
